# Go Ecosystem (Chinese Source)

> English llms.txt for ecosystem directory.

## Module Index

- [Ecosystem Overview](./index.mdx): Overview of Go ecosystem with navigation cards and technology stack recommendations.

## Lazygophers Series

- [lazy-log](./lazy-log.mdx): lazygophers/log high-performance logging library based on zap.

- [lazy-utils](./lazy-utils.mdx): lazygophers/utils modern utility library with 20+ modules.

- [lazy-lrpc](./lazy-lrpc.mdx): lazygophers/lrpc lightweight RPC framework based on fasthttp.

## Web Frameworks

- [Web Frameworks Comparison](./web-frameworks.mdx): Comprehensive comparison of Gin, Echo, and Fiber frameworks.

## Data Access

- [ORM Libraries Comparison](./orm.mdx): In-depth comparison of GORM and Ent.

- [Database Drivers](./database.mdx): Go database programming with database/sql and drivers.

## Infrastructure

- [CLI Tools](./cli.mdx): CLI development with Cobra framework.

- [Logging Libraries Comparison](./logging.mdx): Comparison of zap, logrus, and slog.

- [Configuration Management](./config.mdx): Configuration management with Viper.
